free_text: Measurement of the 233U and 241Pu fission cross
sections relative to the 235U fission cross section
in the neutron energy range 0.024 - 7.4 MeV
INDC(CCP)-171 - table of YFI-25 content only.
TiH2 for T(p,n) neutrons, LiF on Mo
The result from the glass detector was normalized
to the thermal value, and the result from the fission
chamber was normalized to the glass detector result.
- background neutrons from Mo and Ti backing
- angular anisotropy of fission (for glass method),
- energy dependence of fragment detection efficiency,
